title: Clamp Number
code: const clamp = (value: number, min: number, max: number): number => Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max)
description: Constrains a value to a `[min, max]` range in a single expression. `Math.max(value, min)` lifts values below the floor; `Math.min(..., max)` caps values above the ceiling. A fundamental utility in animation, UI, and game programming.
